notes: The game starts and displays the publisher/dev logos and then crashes. I also tried removing the in the game folder's movies since I thought maybe it was a media decoder issue but that didn't help either.
title: Metal Wolf Chaos XD

notes: Tried every Proton version and launch option. Best I could get was default settings or with PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 I got the company logos and then crash. Really hope this one gets fixed soon.
title: Metal Wolf Chaos XD

notes:
Crashes after logos with error:

wine: Unhandled page fault on read access to 0x00000000 at address 0x613ff3 (thread 002a), starting debugger...
title: Metal Wolf Chaos XD

notes: Without trying any options, or disabling anything, will show the studio credits pre-roll fine but crash as soon as it tries to get into the menu.
title: Metal Wolf Chaos XD

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2500U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes: The intro videos play but after that the game crashes.
title: Metal Wolf Chaos XD

notes: Out of the box, the game crashes after the logos. Game launches and runs fine after installing mfplat, found here: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install
title: Metal Wolf Chaos XD

notes:
https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install

Needs MF-Install like some other games, but after that is installed it works completely perfectly!
title: Metal Wolf Chaos XD
